selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the smallest current active-system recall surface and the right parent for one final bounded semantic pass before verification-oriented work.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Preserve the thin boot card as a four-card recall layer while making its nonreplacement, nonpromotion, and thicker-parent dependency impossible to miss.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest next verification packet once the thin-entry boot layer is explicitly fenced.
Strongest later lineage packet if the queue pivots from recall to manifest continuity.
Strongest later reader-contract packet if the queue moves toward manifest-consumption rules.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent boot card already isolates the four minimal cards and their tensions, and the consulted A2-mid anchors already preserve the thicker hierarchy that this thin layer must not replace.

candidate_items.name: FOUR_CARD_OPERATOR_RECALL_SET
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the structural split that keeps the boot card readable and bounded.

candidate_items.name: AUTHORITY_CARD_IS_DISAGREEMENT_ORDER_ONLY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the first card limited to precedence instead of overloading it with the whole boot stack.

candidate_items.name: A2_BOOT_CARD_RETAINS_ORDER_WITHOUT_PRETENDING_SUFFICIENCY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves boot order while explicitly fencing the card against false sufficiency.

candidate_items.name: LIVE_A1_STATUS_CARD_KEEPS_CONSERVATIVE_MAP_AND_BOTTLENECK
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps the current live family map and dominant bottleneck visible together.

candidate_items.name: QUARANTINE_CARD_MUST_STAY_EXPLICIT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Protects the boot card from silent promotion of helper and shell surfaces.

candidate_items.name: BOOT_CARD_IS_RECALL_LAYER_NOT_BOOT_REPLACEMENT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent packet's main nonreplacement fence at the thinnest layer.

quarantined_items.name: THIN_BOOT_CARD_AS_TRUE_BOOT_SUBSTITUTE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly frames thin recall and thick boot as separate needs.

quarantined_items.name: SHORT_RECALL_CARD_AS_CLOSURE_OR_AUTHORITY_PROMOTION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent explicitly says simplification is safe only if quarantine stays visible and thicker context remains upstream.

notes: This batch preserves the thin boot card as a recall-only layer while making its thicker-parent dependency explicit.
No raw source reread and no active append-save were performed.
